Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a sale or expense transaction.

Reference No..description: Unique reference number for the transaction.

Recipient.description: The person or entity receiving or sending the money.

Amount.description: The transaction amount as a string.

Payment Method.description: Method used for payment (e.g., Cash, Card).

Bank.description: The bank associated with the transaction.

/artifacts/default-app-id/users/{userId}.description: Collection of sales transactions for a user.
Collection of expense transactions for a user.
